variants: Celestine Mburu graduated from Mossveil School of Architecture, where she developed a deep understanding of design principles. She currently works at Riverstride Freight, where her proficiency in Finnish vocabulary enhances cross-departmental collaboration. Beyond her role in the logistics sector, Celestine actively supports the Reflections Project, dedicating her time to community outreach. In addition to her professional engagements, her insights into the industry were published by Horizon Spindle Press, showcasing her contributions to the field.
